---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Use this issue template to report unclear, incorrect, or missing documentation
  in the repository.
title: Documentation Issue
labels: documentation

---

## Location
Link to the documentation page or file where the issue occurs.

## Description of the issue
Describe what is unclear, incorrect, or missing.

## Suggested improvement
Explain how the documentation could be improved.

## Additional context
Add screenshots or examples if relevant.
